description: Post-assignment quality flagging: contamination, handler artifacts, expert review

functions.name: flag_contaminant
functions.description: Flag taxa disproportionately represented in control samples

inputs.name: df
inputs.description: Detection data with observation_id and taxon columns

inputs.name: control_samples
inputs.description: Observation IDs of control samples

inputs.name: event_type_col
inputs.description: Column indicating event type (alternative to control_samples)

inputs.name: event_col
inputs.description: Column with observation identifiers

inputs.name: taxon_col
inputs.description: Column with taxon names

inputs.name: reads_col
inputs.description: Column with read counts (for proportion-based scoring)

inputs.name: contaminant_type
inputs.description: 'lab', 'field', or 'positive'

output.description: Input with contaminant_score and contaminant_flag columns added

functions.name: flag_handler
functions.description: Flag detections temporally proximate to handler presence (camera traps)

inputs.name: df
inputs.description: Detection data with datetime column

inputs.name: datetime_col
inputs.description: Column with datetime values

inputs.name: taxon_col
inputs.description: Taxon column

inputs.name: group_col
inputs.description: Column for grouping (e.g., camera station)

inputs.name: interval_minutes
inputs.description: Minutes before/after handler to flag

inputs.name: handler_taxa
inputs.description: Taxa indicating handler presence (default: Homo sapiens)

functions.name: review_assignments
functions.description: LLM expert review of taxonomic assignments for plausibility (habitat fit, geographic range, contaminant risk, alternatives)

inputs.name: df
inputs.description: Data frame with a taxon column

inputs.name: taxon_col
inputs.description: Column name for the taxon to review

inputs.name: taxon_rank_col
inputs.description: Column for consensus rank; triggers lower_hypotheses when coarser than species

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Named list or build_context() output with geography/ecoregion and habitat/main_habitat

inputs.name: target_group
inputs.description: Taxonomic target group (e.g., 'fish', 'birds'); triggers scope review

inputs.name: marker
inputs.description: Molecular marker or detection method (e.g., '12S', 'COI', 'camera trap')

inputs.name: llm_fn
inputs.description: LLM provider function. Use TaxaTools::call_api (auto-selects provider). Valid names: call_api, call_anthropic_api, call_gemini_api, call_openai_api, call_azure_api, call_ollama_api. Do NOT invent other names.

inputs.name: taxa_per_call
inputs.description: Maximum taxa per LLM batch call

inputs.name: pause_seconds
inputs.description: Seconds between LLM calls

inputs.name: verbose
inputs.description: Print progress messages

output.description: Input df with 8 review columns appended: habitat_plausibility, geographic_plausibility, scope_plausibility, contamination_risk, review_alternatives, review_lower_hypotheses, review_confidence, review_comment

functions.scaling_note: LLM calls; batched at taxa_per_call, ~1 min per 30 taxa
